notes.sg-climate-change-geiger-counter: This is a measurement device, not a climate change topic.
notes.sg-climate-change-horizontal-resolution: This is a technical term related to modeling, too generic for a topic.
notes.sg-climate-change-marine-protected-area: While related to environmental management, it's not a direct subtopic of climate change.
notes.sg-climate-change-marine-spatial-plannin: Similar to marine protected areas, this is an environmental management strategy, not a direct climate change topic.
notes.sg-natural-resource-economics-food-secur: This is a subtopic of natural resource economics, but not specifically of water resources. The sample titles also do not strongly indicate a focus on water.
notes.sg-natural-resource-economics-environmen: This is a subtopic of natural resource economics, but not specifically of water resources. The sample titles do not strongly indicate a focus on water.
notes.sg-natural-resource-economics-food-proce: This is a subtopic of natural resource economics, but not specifically of water resources. The sample titles do not strongly indicate a focus on water.
notes.sg-natural-resource-economics-ecological: This is a subtopic of natural resource economics, but not specifically of water resources. The sample titles do not strongly indicate a focus on water.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-atmospheric-chemi: This is a near-duplicate of 'atmospheric chemistry' and is less specific.
notes.sg-climate-model-model-intercomparison-p: This is a more specific version of 'model intercomparison project'.
notes.sg-climate-model-coupled-model-intercomp: This is a more specific version of 'model intercomparison project'.
notes.sg-water-quality-index-of-biological-int: This is a specific type of biological integrity assessment, and thus a duplicate of the more general term.
notes.sg-water-quality-biological-integrity: This is a good, specific subtopic.
notes.sg-water-quality-coral-bleaching: This is a good, specific subtopic.
notes.sg-waste-management-natural-gas: too generic, likely covered by fossil fuel
notes.sg-ecosystem-service-ecosystem-diversity: This is a near-duplicate of functional diversity, which is more specific.
notes.sg-ecosystem-service-functional-diversit: This is a more specific and relevant concept than ecosystem diversity.
